string.name: whats_new_content
string.translation_description: HTML content listing new features in this release, shown in the What's new dialog and appended to the Help screen. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string:
More info cards

Jupiter\'s Galilean moons (Io, Europa, Ganymede and Callisto), Mars\'s moons Phobos and Deimos and others are now searchable with rich info cards and NASA imagery.

Expanded Catalogue

Dozens of new deep sky objects added — including the Double Cluster, 47 Tucanae, the Exposed Cranium Nebula and more — each with descriptions, fun facts and images.
